description: Use this API to add a renewable related model of a designated type to a specified renewable machine. If a model of the designated type already exists at the machine, it is replaced. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = add_wind_model(ibus, id, mtype, name, nicn, idata, chdata, ncon, rdata)
python_syntax: ierr = add_wind_model(ibus, id, mtype, name, nicn, idata, chdata, ncon, rdata)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Renewable machine bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: mtype
parameters.description: Model type. (input; 1 by default).MTYPE = 1 wind generator model).

parameters.name: nicn
parameters.description: Number of icons required by the model. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: idata
parameters.description: An array of NICN elements specifying ICON data. (input; 0 by default). When a character value is intended for an ICON value, the corresponding IDATA entry is ignored and the integer ICON is set to 0).

parameters.name: chdata
parameters.description: An array of NICN elements specifying character ICON data (no default allowed for an ICON for which a character value is to be specified). When an integer value is intended for an ICON value, the corresponding CHDATA entry must be either defaulted or specified as either ‘$$’ or ‘ ‘; the character ICON is set to ‘$$’. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: ncon
parameters.description: Number of cons required by the model. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: rdata
parameters.description: An array of NCON elements specifying CON data. (input; 0.0 by default).

error_codes.description: renewable machine model connection tables full–use pack renewable model tables function.
model is not consistent with MTYPE.
# CONs specified is not the number expected.
# ICONs specified is not the number expected.
maximum number of array elements exceeded.
machine is not designated as a renewable machine in power flow.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
